2025-26 California Baptist Lancers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 25-9 (13-5, 2nd in WAC MBB)

Coach: Rick Croy

PS/G: 72.6 (264th of 365)

PA/G: 67.6 (35th of 365)

SRS: 2.56 (129th of 365)

SOS: -2.50 (195th of 365)

ORtg: 106.5 (245th of 365)

DRtg: 99.0 (31st of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +200000

NCAA Tournament: (#13 seed in East)
Lost East First Round (68-60) versus #4 Kansas

  • WAC Tourney Champ
